# Signatories

## Project team

**Mackson Ncube** (Principal Investigator)

As a professional statistician and data scientist, Mackson is the founder of mightymetrika, a think tank dedicated to developing statistical tools for small sample size research. The mightymetrika also specializes in developing citizen science applications to crowd source the investigation of statistical methods.

* Profiles: [ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Mackson-Ncube) | [UpWork](https://www.upwork.com/freelancers/~01c5a59d1725d12a0a?viewMode=1)
